items.title: Ramona Shelburne reported that the Orlando Magic are a team to watch in the Giannis Antetokounmpo sweepstakes. Hours later, the Orlando Magic hire Sean Sweeney as their head coach. Sweeney was a Bucks assistant during Giannis’ early years and they developed a very close relationship.

items.title: JUST IN: The Orlando Magic will hire Sean Sweeney as their head coach, league sources told @hoopshypeofficial.bsky.social. Sweeney was an associate head coach for the San Antonio Spurs. Prior, he was an assistant coach for the Dallas Mavericks, Detroit Pistons, Milwaukee Bucks, a
items.author: Michael Scotto
items.body_excerpt: JUST IN: The Orlando Magic will hire Sean Sweeney as their head coach, league sources told @hoopshypeofficial.bsky.social. Sweeney was an associate head coach for the San Antonio Spurs. Prior, he was an assistant coach for the Dallas Mavericks, Detroit Pistons, Milwaukee Bucks, and Brooklyn Nets.

items.title: In the before times, the Bucks would announce workouts and make some of the guys available to talk. Fans would get excited and it was good team PR.
items.author: Jim Owczarski
items.body_excerpt:
In the before times, the Bucks would announce workouts and make some of the guys available to talk. Fans would get excited and it was good team PR.

Since the team appears to be entering the after times, might want to bring that back.

items.title: In the before times, the Bucks used to bring in a ton of locals for a workout. Honestly, it was a fun day. The guys knew they weren't going to get drafted/signed. But part of a dream was realized & great team PR.
items.author: Jim Owczarski
items.body_excerpt:
In the before times, the Bucks used to bring in a ton of locals for a workout. Honestly, it was a fun day. The guys knew they weren't going to get drafted/signed. But part of a dream was realized & great team PR.

Since the team appears to be entering the after times, might want to bring that back.

items.title: This is one reason why I still can’t square the Bucks actually trading Giannis Antetokounmpo - Jimmy Haslam has been looking for a QB for 13 years.
items.author: Jim Owczarski
items.body_excerpt:
This is one reason why I still can’t square the Bucks actually trading Giannis Antetokounmpo - Jimmy Haslam has been looking for a QB for 13 years. 

His Watson contract basically created NFL collusion on other QB deals.

And he’s already got THE guy on his basketball team.

items.title: The Knicks have outscored their opponents by 225 points over the last 10 games, the highest such figure in NBA history over any 10-game span, regular season or postseason.
items.author: NBA Stat
items.body_excerpt:
The Knicks have outscored their opponents by 225 points over the last 10 games, the highest such figure in NBA history over any 10-game span, regular season or postseason.

The previous mark of 214 points was set by the Milwaukee Bucks from Nov. 27 to Dec. 16, 1973.

(via @statitudes.com)
#NBA

items.title: Sources: The Milwaukee Bucks will add Patrick St. Andrews as an assistant coach, reuniting him with coach Taylor Jenkins. He was an assistant coach for the Blazers. Prior, he was an assistant coach with Jenkins on the Grizzlies and with Mike Budenholzer on the Bucks and Hawks.
items.author: Michael Scotto
items.body_excerpt: Sources: The Milwaukee Bucks will add Patrick St. Andrews as an assistant coach, reuniting him with coach Taylor Jenkins. He was an assistant coach for the Blazers. Prior, he was an assistant coach with Jenkins on the Grizzlies and with Mike Budenholzer on the Bucks and Hawks.
